overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's neon-lit commercial district during a rainy dusk. The player moves from open streets beneath towering holographic advertisements, under elevated highways, across intersections, and finally descends into a lower pedestrian walkway. Wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon signs and street lighting throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with towering holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, observing the towering neon advertisements and futuristic cityscape

notable_agents.action: walking with an umbrella along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building covered in vertical holographic advertisement screens displaying various products
large floating holographic display emitting bright green light
tall vertical digital billboard with yellow and red neon signage
rain-soaked asphalt road reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall red utility pole with attached signage and lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide cyberpunk commercial street at dusk, with towering cylindrical buildings covered in holographic advertisements dominating the skyline. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon greens, pinks, and yellows from the surrounding architecture. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing red utility poles and parked vehicles while sparse pedestrians walk in scattered directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: enters covered area beneath elevated highway overpass, reducing sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the highway overpass, passing street vendors and digital kiosks

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with vehicles passing above
small vendor stall with striped awning and illuminated signage
tall digital advertising kiosk displaying pink and white graphics
scattered garbage bags and litter accumulated near the vendor cart

segments.scene_description: Moving beneath the elevated highway overpass, the environment becomes semi-covered with reduced natural light. The concrete sidewalk continues forward, flanked by a street vendor cart with a striped awning on the left and glowing pink digital kiosks on the right. Trash and debris accumulate near the walkway edges, and the cylindrical ad tower remains visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: waits at crosswalk for traffic to clear before crossing the intersection
turns right while crossing the intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating across the yellow-striped crosswalk, avoiding passing vehicles while turning right

notable_agents.action: futuristic black pickup truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall traffic signal pole with illuminated green walk signal
building facade covered in purple and blue neon signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a wide open intersection, the camera approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk. After waiting for a futuristic black pickup truck to pass, the camera crosses the intersection while turning right. Traffic lights and digital signage illuminate the crossing area, while the cylindrical ad tower remains prominent in the center distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower pedestrian underpass with debris and makeshift shelter

events.description: descends concrete stairs into lower pedestrian walkway beneath street level

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs into a lower level walkway, passing debris and makeshift shelters

entered.detail: descending concrete staircase with metal railings leading to lower walkway
blue and red painted metal handrails along the stairway
striped tarpaulin covering cardboard boxes and bedding materials
scattered cardboard boxes and trash accumulated in the corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a narrow, enclosed lower walkway as the camera descends concrete stairs beneath the street level. The environment becomes darker and more derelict, featuring metal railings, scattered cardboard debris, and a makeshift shelter with a striped tarp. The cylindrical ad tower remains faintly visible above, casting a pink neon glow down into the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from wide, towering streets into a derelict underground walkway. It begins on a broad sidewalk at dusk, moving past red utility poles and parked vehicles while vibrant holographic advertisements reflect off the wet asphalt. As the camera glides beneath an elevated highway overpass, the open sky is replaced by concrete shadows and the glow of pink digital kiosks and street vendor carts. The scene then opens back up into a wide intersection, where the camera pauses for a futuristic black pickup truck before crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk toward the distant cylindrical ad tower. Finally, the perspective descends a set of concrete stairs, shifting from the bright city lights into a dark, enclosed lower walkway filled with metal railings and makeshift shelters.
